text:
is a commandant of the Cadet Corps.

Appearance

Keith is well groomed with a goatee and an older appearance. He wears a camo green trench coat along with a gray button down and usually the Cadet Corps uniform.

Personality

Keith acts in a superior manner toward his cadets. He has an intimidating demeanor toward the cadets and his subordinates, but this is in the pursuit of fulfilling his job as an instructor properly.
